query: double exposure ghostly silhouette overlapping portrait
message: sub:double_exposure — anti_aesthetic — overlapping ghostly portraits, doubled silhouettes, layered composites

response.objective_caption: A portrait sequence showing multiple overlapping profile views of a man in formal attire—dark suit, white collared shirt, and dark tie—arranged in a progression from three-quarter face to full right profile against a solid black background. Each successive profile is increasingly in shadow and positioned further to the right, creating a layered progression of the same individual. Dramatic directional lighting illuminates the left side of each face while the right side falls into shadow, highlighting facial contours, skin texture, and the crisp edges of the white collar.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A surreal portrait sequence using double exposure to superimpose multiple overlapping profile views of a man in formal attire—dark suit, white collared shirt, and dark tie—arranged in a dreamlike progression from three-quarter face to full right profile against a solid black background. The ghosted, translucent layers create a sense of temporal unfolding or fractured identity, with each successive profile increasingly in shadow and positioned further right. Dramatic directional lighting illuminates the left side of each face while the right side falls into shadow, enhancing the uncanny, otherworldly quality of the repeated, semi-transparent figures.
